Privacy PolicyVideo Player app respect your preferences concerning the treatment of features provided by mobile device that we may use. This Privacy Policy explains what kind of features we use.

decoder_heading: BY INSTALLING THE APPS ON YOUR MOBILE DEVICE, ENTERING INTO, CONNECTING TO, ACCESSING AND/OR USING THE APPS, YOU AGREE TO THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS SET FORTH IN THIS PRIVACY POLICY.

decoder_heading: Why the Video Player use the READ_PHONE_STATE feature provided by mobile device is to pause playing video when there comes a phone call, and don't collect any infomation from user.
